data.title: Data breach at PNC Financial Services in Sept 2025, investigated by Edelson Lechtzin LLP for compromised customer data.
data.description: A legal investigation is currently underway at the Newtown-based law firm Edelson Lechtzin LLP concerning data privacy issues related to a recent breach at PNC Financial Services. Discovered early last month, the breach has prompted scrutiny. Individuals seeking consultation on this matter with legal representation are encouraged to reach out for further information and assistance.

data.title: Amazon to pay $2.5 billion in FTC lawsuit, $1 billion in fines and $1.5 billion in customer compensation, each eligible user expected to receive around $51.
data.description: E-commerce giant Amazon.com, Inc. has reached a settlement of $2.5 billion after allegations of deceptive practices regarding its Prime subscription service. The settlement includes $1 billion in fines and $1.5 billion to compensate affected customers, with each eligible user estimated to receive around $51. This agreement follows a lawsuit from the Federal Trade Commission in 2023 challenging Amazon's treatment of customers. The deal, announced recently, marks one of the largest settlements by the FTC. While Amazon did not admit liability, they did not dispute the accusations. This news has resulted in movement in the company's stock. For more details, visit the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Trump administration reviewing medical imports to assess reliance on foreign suppliers. National security review initiated on Sept. 2 under Section 232. Public input sought for analysis.
data.description: Under the Trump administration, the U.S. Commerce Department has started a national security evaluation of medical imports, including Personal Protective Equipment (PPE), consumables, and medical devices, to assess the dependency on foreign suppliers for essential health products. The review was initiated on September 2nd under Section 232 of the Trade Expansion Act of 1962, enabling the government to determine if specific imports pose a threat to U.S. security or industrial capabilities. Public feedback, consisting of data, analyses, and comments, is being requested. Commenters are encouraged to submit scanned documents instead of digitally altered files.

data.title: Minnesota Dental Association announces 2025-2026 officers and trustees in Minneapolis, with Dr. Wagnild as president.
data.description: In Minneapolis on September 19, 2025, the Minnesota Dental Association's Leadership Conference saw the installation of new officers and trustees. Dr. Scott Wagnild took on the role of president for the term 2025-2026, while Dr. John Noack became the president-elect.

data.title: ASPCA offers $2.5 million in grants for shelters to improve animal welfare. Applications open until Oct 17.
data.description: Proposals are currently being accepted until October 17 for grant funding totaling over $2.5 million, aimed at enhancing results for animals and expanding care accessibility at shelters. This initiative is led by the ASPCA® (The American Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals®).

data.title: Author Michael Beck shares moving memoir about battling autism, homelessness, and ADHD, published by Liberty Hill Publishing. A must-read for those facing mental health challenges.
data.description: A compelling new book from Liberty Hill Publishing is now available for individuals dealing with autism, depression, addiction, grief, and other mental health issues. Authored by Michael Beck, this book provides a unique insight into his life with autism. Released on September 25, 2025, in Orlando, Florida, this is a must-read for those navigating similar challenges.

data.title: Royce Small-Cap Trust (NYSE:RVT) is the oldest and largest small-cap closed-end fund with an average weekly trading volume of 1,542,518 shares. Adviser has over 50 years of experience. As of 08/31/25, NAV is 17.98 and MKT is 16.06.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in New York, the oldest and biggest small-cap closed-end fund with an average weekly trading volume of around 1,542,518 shares made headlines. The fund's advisor boasts over 50 years of expertise in small- and micro-cap investments. As of August 31, 2025, the closing prices were observed at a Net Asset Value (NAV) of $17.98 and a Market Value (MKT) of $16.06 for the fund.

data.title: Cailin Birch from EIU to keynote at IPA AltsGlobal in London. Registration open for premier event on Sept. 25, 2025.
data.description: Registration is now available for a prestigious global conference on alternative investments to be held in London on September 25, 2025. The Institute for Portfolio Alternatives (IPA) has confirmed that Cailin Birch, the Principal Global Economist at The Economist Intelligence Unit (EIU), will be a keynote speaker at the event.

data.title: Everlight Solar wins 2025 Best Perks & Benefits award, recognizing commitment to employee support and incentives.
data.description: In Verona, Wisconsin on September 25, 2025, Everlight Solar was proudly awarded Comparably's Best Perks & Benefits accolade for 2025. This prestigious recognition highlights the company's dedication to offering employees extensive support, valuable incentives, and enriching benefits, showcasing their commitment to employee well-being and satisfaction.

data.title: Tinggly introduces corporate gift boxes for recognizing employees with unique experiences, simplifying HR programs.
data.description: Tinggly, a top experiential gift company, has just introduced a specialized range of corporate gifts. These new rewards aim to streamline HR recognition programs for worldwide workforces and remote workers. The customizable and sustainable items offer unique experiences for employees. This innovative launch was made public on September 25, 2025, in New York.

data.title: Ereztech celebrates 15-year anniversary by opening $10M U.S. manufacturing facility in Saukville, Wisconsin.
data.description: In Saukville, Wisconsin, on September 25, 2025, Ereztech, a company specializing in organometallic chemistry, revealed the inauguration of their new 30,000-square-foot site. This facility, costing $10 million, signifies a major achievement for the company.

data.title: Bahamas Grid Company (BGC) hires 25 new employees to strengthen New Providence's grid, in a major recruitment drive.
data.description: In Nassau, Bahamas, as of September 25, 2025, The Bahamas Grid Company (BGC) has ramped up its hiring efforts by bringing on board 25 new employees since July 2025. These new recruits have been spread out across various departments including field operations, technical support, and corporate leadership. This recent recruitment drive signifies a significant expansion for the company and is considered one of the most ambitious workforce growth initiatives undertaken by BGC.

data.title: ClorDiSys expanding sterilization capacity, doubling with new chamber and facility to meet customer demand.
data.description: In a recent press release dated September 25, 2025, ClorDiSys Solutions, LLC, based in Branchburg, NJ, a prominent provider of chlorine dioxide-based contract sterilization services, disclosed plans for a significant enhancement in its processing capacities and workforce. The expansion aims to cater to the escalating demand from customers and solidify the company's position as a technological frontrunner in the industry.

data.title: Craig Maniglia from Sarasota County Schools wins SchoolCEO's 2025 Excellence in School Marketing Award.
data.description: In Little Rock, Arkansas, Craig Maniglia, the director of communications and government affairs at Sarasota County Schools (SCS) in Florida, has been awarded the 2025 Excellence in School Marketing Award by SchoolCEO. This prestigious award, presented annually by the only marketing magazine in K-12 public education, recognizes school communicators for their innovative contributions to the field of school marketing. The winner was revealed at the annual event, celebrating Maniglia's outstanding work in this area.

data.title: HashKey Fund in Hong Kong worth $500M set to revolutionize Bitcoin and Ether treasuries through DATs. Compliance, diversification, and transparency emphasized.
data.description: A new fund in Hong Kong, the HashKey Fund, worth $500 million, is demonstrating how Decentralized Autonomous Treasuries (DATs) could revolutionize the management of Bitcoin and Ether assets by focusing on compliance, diversification, and transparency. This initiative highlights the potential for DATs to reshape traditional treasury management practices in the cryptocurrency space.

data.title: AD Mortgage introduces Freddie Mac HomeOne program, expanding homeownership access.
data.description: A prominent national mortgage lender, AD Mortgage, revealed the introduction of the Freddie Mac HomeOne program. The program aims to assist potential homeowners in securing mortgages at favorable terms.

data.title: Sultan bin Ahmed initiates Al Reeh Al Mursala Village in Sri Lanka, symbolizing new development.
data.description: Sultan bin Ahmed has initiated the construction of the Al Reeh Al Mursala Village in Sri Lanka. The foundation stone was laid in Colombo, marking the beginning of this significant development project. This village is expected to encompass various facilities and amenities, catering to the needs of the local community. With an investment of X amount, this initiative aims to enhance the infrastructure of the region and contribute to its economic growth. The project signifies a positive step towards fostering community development and improving the quality of life for individuals in Sri Lanka.

data.title: Amazon's stock declined after agreeing to pay $2.5 billion to resolve FTC's Prime lawsuit regarding sign-up tactics.
data.description: Following the announcement that Amazon has agreed to settle a lawsuit with the FTC over its Prime sign-up methods, the tech giant saw a decrease in its stock value. Amazon will be paying a substantial $2.5 billion to resolve the FTC's Prime lawsuit. This news caused Amazon's stock to slip, reflecting investor response to the settlement.

data.title: Cloudflare plans stablecoin for AI agents in e-commerce. Stock surged 93% in 2025. Promotes rise of agentic e-commerce.
data.description: Cloudflare has revealed intentions to release a new stablecoin aimed at assisting AI agents in the realm of e-commerce. In a noteworthy trend, Cloudflare's stock has experienced a remarkable increase of 93% throughout the year 2025. This move is seen as a strategic response to the anticipated growth of agentic e-commerce.

data.title: Meta Platforms releases 3rd gen smart glasses. Apple, Google eye market entry. Will smart glasses surpass smartphones?
data.description: A new era of smart glasses has been ushered in by Meta Platforms with the launch of their third generation. This move has ignited a competitive frenzy among tech giants such as Apple and Google, who are gearing up to join the smart glasses market. The question arises on whether smart glasses could potentially replace smartphones as the primary tech device. This development sets the stage for a battleground where Meta, Apple, Google, and other players will assert their dominance in the emerging smart glasses industry.
